title: dupatya capito
intro: Dupatya capito, also known as "Buddha's hand" or "fingered citron," is a type of citrus fruit that has a unique appearance with its finger-like extensions and is often used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Dupatya capito include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to fight off infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dupatya capito include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Dupatya capito can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
